title: ESSENTIALS FOR JAVA
description: All the Essential Mods you need to Play Minecraft java!
body:
### - Essentials for Java: A Minecraft Modpack for the Essentials

Essentials for Java is a Minecraft modpack that's like a Swiss Army knife for your world. It's packed with features that make your Minecraft experience smoother, more enjoyable, and even a bit more essential.

Its Features:

It optimises your game with mods like Sodium and Indium.

It also adds resource packs like 3d Defualt to make your game look better!

It is simple and easy to install with all the essential mods you need for playing Minecraft.
